rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks scoped to the owning component declaration
Use assume/guarantee syntax for component type contracts with visible ports
generic_rules: Write type scope contracts using visible identifiers and valid AGREE scalar types
Relate outputs to inputs in guarantees; avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE constants and equations must use int, real, or bool types
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, and declarations
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports
